---
name: Design Proposal
about: Propose a new design or protocol change
title: '[Design Proposal] '
labels: design-decision, protocol-change
assignees: ''
---

## Design Proposal

### Summary

Provide a concise summary of the proposed design or protocol change.

### Motivation

Why is this change necessary? What problem does it solve?

### Proposed Solution

Describe the proposed solution in detail.

### Impact Analysis

How will this change affect:
- Existing functionality?
- Protocol compatibility?
- Implementation complexity?
- Documentation requirements?

### Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or designs you've considered and why they were not chosen.

### Protocol Impact

Which protocol documents will be affected by this change?

- [ ] `docs/core/data_protocol.md` - Data Protocol
- [ ] `docs/core/event_protocol.md` - Event Protocol
- [ ] `docs/core/gateway_protocol.md` - Gateway Protocol
- [ ] `docs/core/plugin_protocol.md` - Plugin Protocol
- [ ] `docs/core/ai_protocol.md` - AI Protocol
- [ ] `docs/core/strategy_protocol.md` - Strategy Protocol
- [ ] `docs/core/risk_protocol.md` - Risk Protocol
- [ ] `docs/core/backtest_protocol.md` - Backtest Protocol
- [ ] `docs/system/architecture.md` - Architecture
- [ ] `docs/system/config_protocol.md` - Config Protocol
- [ ] `docs/system/ui_bridge_protocol.md` - UI Bridge Protocol
- [ ] None (this is a new design proposal)

### Breaking Changes

Will this change introduce breaking changes? If yes, describe how to migrate existing code or configurations.

### Additional Context

Add any other context, diagrams, or supporting documents here.

### RFC Discussion

For major protocol changes, this proposal will be discussed for at least 7 days before approval.
